---
title: "Mary Caroline Holbeach"
---

## Mary Caroline Holbeach

**Dates:** (1854-1933)

**Maiden name:** (Walrond)

### Description

correspondent

### Biography

The letters to Mrs Holbeach in 1893-4 were probably addressed to the wife of Walter Henry Holbeach (1846-1901) of Farnborough Hall (which is the address on the envelope).

### Letters

- Letter from July 9th 1894
- Letter from Aug 21st 1893

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
